name: 62"x14" New Traditional Downbridge Floor Lamp Brass - Threshold™: ETL Listed, Linen Shade, Metal Body
description:
Illuminate any indoor setting in elegant style with this New Traditional Downbridge Floor Lamp from Threshold™. This floor lamp features a slim metal column atop a round pedestal base and a white downward-facing drum shade that's perfect for task lighting. Its gold-tone brass finish adds shine and effortlessly complements a range of decor styles. Place it next to a sofa in your living room or next to your favorite reading chair to decorate and illuminate your space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
